reservation.source_phrase: We recommend booking your tickets online to secure your spot for your desired date and time.
reservation.source_block: Guarantee Your Entry: We recommend booking your tickets online to secure your spot for your desired date and time. Capacity is limited, especially on weekends and holidays.

hours.source_phrase: The Zoo is open daily from 9am – 4pm (last entry at 3:30) for the spring and summer seasons!
hours.source_block: The Zoo is open daily from 9am – 4pm (last entry at 3:30) for the spring and summer seasons! For all ticket assistance questions, email info@rwpzoo.org. Tickets are non-transferable and non-refundable.
